name: Styled Subgraph Metabolomics Workflow
input: Create a top-down flowchart showing a multi-omics metabolomics workflow with styled subgraphs. Sample Collection (styled with light blue background): Blood Draw, Urine Collection, Tissue Biopsy. Sample Prep (styled with light green background): Extraction, Derivatization, Quality Control. Analysis Platforms (styled with light purple background, running in parallel): LC-MS Platform, GC-MS Platform, NMR Platform. Data Integration (styled with light orange background): Feature Alignment, Statistical Analysis, Pathway Mapping. All three platforms converge into Feature Alignment. Use subgraph styling with fill colors.
qualityCriteria: Parallel analysis platforms shown (LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR)
Convergence arrows from platforms to integration
Subgraph styling with fill colors applied
Fan-out from QC to multiple platforms
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Multi-omics workflow with 4 styled subgraphs, parallel platforms converging into integration, professional lab appearance.
